# Statistical Thermodynamics

**Summary**: The application of statistical mechanics to describe macroscopic properties from microscopic states.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2019]] applied statistical thermodynamics to derive the mean spherical approximation (MSA) for electrolyte systems.

## Key Results and Findings

- The MSA is a popular closure for the Ornstein-Zernicke equation, providing better accuracy than Debye-Hückel by considering ion size. ([[2019-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2019, p. 51]])
